calendar.matters:
Petition Of Trustee For Order Confirming Assets To Trust And Ownership Interest In Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Leece for (trustee) Anthony Vernhagen who is present in court.

The Court asked counsel if she had any documents or proof regarding ownership in the ranch. Ms. Leece stated that the proceeds that went into the purchase of the 37% were from the Front Street sale, together they owned 65%, explained how they came to their figures and that she has prepared a supplemental declaration to file. The Court requested that counsel file the declaration and the matter will be under submission pending the review. Ms. Leece stated that the has an affidavit of corrective grant deed which they will record, that it specifies the percentages and that she will submit 2 proposed orders, one of which will reflect the corrective grant deed. The petition of trustee for order confirming assets to trust and ownership in real property was taken under submission as of May 27, 2016.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
